particulars.description: Assarts farm burns lane warsop t/no NT230274 by way of fixed charge, the benefit of all covenants & rights concerning the property & all plant machinery, fixtures, fittings, furniture, equipment, implements & utensils. The goodwill of any business carried on at the property & the proceeds of any insurance affecting the property or assets.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: Part of assarts farm together with black clump in the parish of warsop, county of nottinghamshire comprising 383.60 acres or thereabouts.
